title: Install deterministic ESP image tooling
description: The ARM validation host linked ESP32-S3 ELFs but final image packaging failed because Python intelhex was unavailable. Add the packaging dependency to the locked/bootstrap builder environment and validate reproducible image generation.
acceptance_criteria: Fresh documented builder bootstrap provides the pinned intelhex dependency; canonical Heltec V3 and T-Deck west builds finish packaging; dependency lock and bootstrap checks prevent recurrence.
